technical_replicate: Each experiment was conducted in triplicate
experimental_design: SHED-derived exosomes vs normal SHED exosomes
This study aimed to investigate the angiogenic effects of SHED-derived exosomes
factor_value: treatment (apoptotic SHED-derived exosomes, normal SHED exosomes)
HUVECs treated with apoptotic SHED exosomes exhibited significantly enhanced proliferation and migration compared with those treated with normal SHED exosomes.
number_of_technical_replicates: Each experiment was conducted in triplicate
